if user !== target
move user: target, center, 5, auto offset x -300, auto offset y +50
face user: target
wait for move
face user: target
camera focus: user
zoom: 100%, 20
wait: 20
camera focus: target
zoom: 100%, 20
camera offset: right, 50
immortal: targets, true
else
camera focus: user
zoom: 100%, 20
wait: 20
camera focus: target
zoom: 100%, 20
camera offset: right, 50
immortal: targets, true
</setup action>
<whole action>
</whole action>

if user !== target
motion thrust: user, no weapon
wait: 7
projectile icon 1746: start user, goal target, duration 20, spin 0.1, icon scale 1, arc 40
wait for projectile
action effect
shake screen: 5, 5, 30
Move target: backward, 25, 3
motion damage: target
face target: forward
SE: Break
animation 204: target
wait for animation
else
motion victory: user, no weapon
wait: 7
projectile icon 1746: start user, goal target, duration 30, spin 0.1, icon scale 1, arc 60
wait: 5
wait for projectile
action effect
shake screen: 5, 5, 30
SE: Break
animation 204: target
motion standby: user
wait for animation
</target action>

能够补充生命的丹药，这种丹药只存在于过去的某个时间节点，只能够在特定地点"王都"使用
name: 中级真灵丹（王都）
note:
<quality:3>
<ici:1>
<Variable 25 Buy Price: 4>
<pos=APs text=使用限制:随时 size=16 color=rgba(255,255,255,1) line=false align=0>
<pos=APs text=\c[1]回复:1000魔法值 size=16 color=rgba(255,255,255,1) line=false align=0>
<setup action>
display action
if user !== target
move user: target, center, 5, auto offset x -300, auto offset y +50
face user: target
wait for move
face user: target
camera focus: user
zoom: 100%, 20
wait: 20
camera focus: target
zoom: 100%, 20
camera offset: right, 50
immortal: targets, true
else
camera focus: user
zoom: 100%, 20
wait: 20
camera focus: target
zoom: 100%, 20
camera offset: right, 50
immortal: targets, true
</setup action>
<whole action>
</whole action>
<target action>
if user !== target
motion thrust: user, no weapon
wait: 7
projectile icon 1747: start user, goal target, duration 20, spin 0.1, icon scale 1, arc 40
wait for projectile
action effect
shake screen: 5, 5, 30
Move target: backward, 25, 3
motion damage: target
face target: forward
SE: Break
animation 204: target
wait for animation
else
motion victory: user, no weapon
wait: 7
projectile icon 1747: start user, goal target, duration 30, spin 0.1, icon scale 1, arc 60
wait: 5
wait for projectile
action effect
shake screen: 5, 5, 30
SE: Break
animation 204: target
motion standby: user
wait for animation
</target action>
<SDCAllow>
